summary: Monte Carlo forecast: median ~19.8, P10=15.4, P90=25.9. VIX at 14.5 on Jan 2, with FOMC and earnings catalysts in window.
content: Current VIX: 14.51 (Jan 2, 2026). Declined from 28 in late Nov. Window Jan 19-30 includes likely FOMC meeting (Jan 28-29) and Q4 earnings season. Monte Carlo with mean-reverting jump-diffusion model. Blended 3 scenarios (low vol 35%, normal 45%, elevated 20%). Key percentiles: P10=15.4, P20=16.8, P40=18.8, P60=20.8, P80=23.5, P90=25.9.
